author: Philip Utenbroeke
text: Alstie afgod ute gaf gheen soen,

author: Philip Utenbroeke
text: Bonden si dat beilde ende ander met;

author: Philip Utenbroeke
text: Die coninc wart in groter node

author: Philip Utenbroeke
text: Van gramscepen, ende sprac ten wiven:

author: Philip Utenbroeke
text: "Ic en hiet u niet dit bedriven!

author: Philip Utenbroeke
text: Ic sweert u, bi der gode cracht,

author: Philip Utenbroeke
text: Met allen sinne, met alre macht

author: Philip Utenbroeke
text: Sal ic mi wreken ende u verderven,

author: Philip Utenbroeke
text: Twi lietse hem van cranken wiven

author: Philip Utenbroeke
text: So swaer een steen ghecoppelt vort

author: Philip Utenbroeke
text: An die voete, dat al die lede

author: Philip Utenbroeke
text: Ende gaf Gode also den gheest.

author: Philip Utenbroeke
text: Die daer ute in corter stonde

author: Philip Utenbroeke
text: Onthovet so wart soe ter stont.

author: Philip Utenbroeke
text: Als dese dinc dus was gedaen,

author: Philip Utenbroeke
text: Ende hi bekeerder vele van dien.

author: Philip Utenbroeke
text: Ende daer die coninc af heift verstaen,

author: Philip Utenbroeke
text: Dedi hem allen thooft of slaen.

author: Philip Utenbroeke
text: Met ysere binden alle die lede,

author: Philip Utenbroeke
text: Ende met roeden slaen langhe ure;

author: Philip Utenbroeke
text: Al vul viers was hi ghedaen,

author: Philip Utenbroeke
text: Met pecke ghemanc, dat hi so zaen

author: Philip Utenbroeke
text: Als was smalt die celle te hant,

author: Philip Utenbroeke
text: Ende maecte den lieden de Gods wet cont,

author: Philip Utenbroeke
text: Des coninx gramscap noch al meerde,

author: Philip Utenbroeke
text: Hem an den hals so menighen man,

author: Philip Utenbroeke
text: Ende so sleeptemenne achter straten dan.

author: Philip Utenbroeke
text: Ende dede sinen rudders na hem tesen

author: Philip Utenbroeke
text: Met scichten, dat niet in vresen

author: Philip Utenbroeke
text: Den sant brochte no in scaden,

author: Philip Utenbroeke
text: Aldus an hem gheen pinen sceen,

author: Philip Utenbroeke
text: Doe was hem thooft ghesleghen af,

author: Philip Utenbroeke
text: Maer eer dat men hem dat dede,

author: Philip Utenbroeke
text: Dedi te Gode ene salighe bede,

author: Philip Utenbroeke
text: Die ons moete in staden staen.

author: Philip Utenbroeke
text: Aldus was hi met Gode ontfaen!"

author: Philip Utenbroeke
text: Dese twee waren in enen kere

author: Philip Utenbroeke
text: Daer hebbensi hem thooft of ghesleghen,

author: Philip Utenbroeke
text: Of hi den goden geen ere doet.

author: Philip Utenbroeke
text: Als die haer secghen niet georlovet.

author: Philip Utenbroeke
text: Die te Viane hilt biscops stede,

author: Philip Utenbroeke
text: Nu hort miracle meer van desen.

author: Philip Utenbroeke
text: An een couter, dat hem goet dochte

author: Philip Utenbroeke
text: Daer hi ene aex toe wit,

author: Philip Utenbroeke
text: Up enen sondach so was dit,

author: Philip Utenbroeke
text: Hem crompen die vingher in sulker nosen,

author: Philip Utenbroeke
text: Dat hi des staels niet conde ghelosen,

author: Philip Utenbroeke
text: Ende bleef also twee jaer dan.

author: Philip Utenbroeke
text: Ende hi ghenas te hant na desen.

author: Philip Utenbroeke
text: Vander kerken daer wi af spraken

author: Philip Utenbroeke
text: Nam een edel man enighe saken,

author: Philip Utenbroeke
text: Die niet ne wilde keren dat.

author: Philip Utenbroeke
text: Nochtan dats hem die pape bat

author: Philip Utenbroeke
text: Bi sinen clerken, dien die here

author: Philip Utenbroeke
text: Ende diende den here vanden lande,

author: Philip Utenbroeke
text: Dat over hem wart menighe claghe.

author: Philip Utenbroeke
text: Ende sente Juliaens kerken waest goet.

author: Philip Utenbroeke
text: Die clerc nam daer sijn ghevouch,

author: Philip Utenbroeke
text: Ende als men hem vor waer ghewouch

author: Philip Utenbroeke
text: Dattie scape, die hi vinc ane,

author: Philip Utenbroeke
text: Dus voerdi dane dat hi woude

author: Philip Utenbroeke
text: Quam hi hier na, die niewer ave

author: Philip Utenbroeke
text: Peinsde; ende hem quam alte hant

author: Philip Utenbroeke
text: Van cortse an een swaer b[r]ant,

author: Philip Utenbroeke
text: Dat hi ne mochte spreken no gaen.

author: Philip Utenbroeke
text: Omme water bat bi daer nare,

author: Philip Utenbroeke
text: Ende als men cortelike dat dede

author: Philip Utenbroeke
text: Ginc van hem sulc rooc ende stanc,

author: Philip Utenbroeke
text: Dat wie daer was, vlo; - eer iets lanc

author: Philip Utenbroeke
text: Een kerstin waest van goeder zede.

author: Philip Utenbroeke
text: Niet dat hi scuwen wilde te sere ...
